> Gerrit said "This patch only contains changes that I don't know how
 > to test or build. Skipping", so it means master doesn't need this

The "Lustre Gerrit Janitor" is Oleg's fast-test system, and it does not test non-functional changes at all.  There is nothing else that needs to be done for this message.
